series_metadata.series_description: Weekly reports, major unusual incident reports, budgets, grant request, etc. including information regarding individuals with developmental disabilities who are receiving or seeking to receive services from a county board of DD or Developmental Center, or are the subject of a report of a case of neglect or other major unusual incident.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 6 years ; Electronic: Retain for 6 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
